# EchoVLM: Dynamic Mixture-of-Experts Vision-Language Model for Ultrasound Intelligence

From [arXiv:2509.14977](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.14977)

## Core Concept

This paper addresses key challenges in vision-language by introducing novel techniques for dynamic mixture-of-experts vision-language model for ultrasound intelligence. The approach enables more effective handling of complex scenarios in moe.

## Architecture Overview

```
    ↓

    ↓
Core Algorithm
    ↓
Output/Results
```

The implementation follows the methodology described in the paper, focusing on practical deployment of the core techniques.

- Monitor performance metrics closely during deployment
